Tarent..Bladder: There is involuntary urination when coughing. In the pathogenesis the symptoms are much like cystitis and it has cured inflammation of the bladder. In keeping with these general symptoms there is spasmodic action of the bladder; spasmodic retention of urine; copious urine with emaciation and sugar.
Tarent..Chest: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh. Oppression in the chest when raising the arms and when lying on the left side. Rheumatic pains. Many pains through and in the chest.
Tarent..Extremities: Weakness, numbness and restlessness are always present. Rheumatic pains are numerous. The pains of the limbs are so great that he cannot stand the weight of the clothing. Heaviness and numbness of the upper limbs. Must move the hands constantly and pick the fingers from nervousness. He is moving the legs constantly; heaviness in the legs; bruised pains in the legs.
Tarent..Generalities: It is full of pains in the body and limbs; pains in the bones; pains in the arms and in the joints. The patient himself is always sensitive to cold, so the pains in the limbs are worse in cold air and from becoming cold. Cold damp weather aggravates all the symptoms. Walking in the open air when not cold ameliorates most of his symptoms. Open air ameliorates, rubbing ameliorates.
Tarent..Generalities, weakness, enervation: There is weakness of all the limbs. Emaciation is so marked that it may be said sometimes that the flesh falls off from him.
Tarent..Genitalia female: In the female also there is violent, uncontrollable sexual erethism. Menstrual flow too early and copious. Violent itching of the genitals extending far up into the vagina, worse at night. Pain and violent cramps in the uterus. Nymphomania has been cured by this remedy. Extreme hyperesthesia of the genitals. Fibroid tumors have been cured. Great relaxation of the muscles and displacement of the uterus. Strong bearing down feeling in the pelvis. Burning in the uterus; swelling and induration of the uterus.
Tarent..Head: Contortions and jerking of the head. Constantly rubs the head against something, sometimes it is the pillow when in bed. Throws the head from side to side, here and there. She has a sensation of hammers in the head. Burning heat in the head.
Tarent..Mind: The nervous manifestations of this remedy are almost indescribable and too numerous to mention. Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. Depraved imaginations prevail through all the proving. Loss of all shame. Desire to run about, to dance and jump up and down. Great fantastic dancing. Violence is a strong feature of the remedy. Violence with anger. Tears his clothing.
Tarent..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. The anxiety is felt sometimes in the mind, sometimes in the whole body, sometimes in the limbs and in the stomach. The extreme restlessness of the limbs is like Ars. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head. Restlessness of the limbs in the evening, in bed before going to sleep, like Ars. and Lyc.
Tarent..Rectum: Burning in the rectum. In the rectum there is pain, smarting, tenesmus and in the abdomen colic.
Tarent..Rectum, constipation: It has cured most terrible and alarming constipation after cathartics and injections failed to effect a movement. The symptoms that guide to it are the continual tossing, anxiety, restlessness, rolling from side to side and rubbing the head against the pillow. There is no desire for stool. Most difficult stool.
Tarent..Respiration: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh.
Tarent..Respiration, difficult: It has great difficulty in breathing very much like that which is found in cardiac troubles, such a pressure upon the chest with panting respiration and suffocative catarrh. Oppression in the chest when raising the arms and when lying on the left side.
Tarent..Skin: Creeping and crawling in the skin all over the body. Itching, biting and creeping all over the body marked in the limbs. Itching and burning. It has cured a dry itching eczema of the extremities and other parts of the skin after Ars. and Sulph. have failed. It is a very deep acting, long acting remedy and a most useful remedy in skin affections.
Tarent..Stomach: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food. Thirst for cold water. Has nausea and vomiting. Has bitter eructations. Has an empty all-gone feeling in the stomach, an anxious feeling in the stomach. Vomits all food taken. Burning pain in the stomach.
Tarent..Generalities, weakness: There is weakness of all the limbs. Emaciation is so marked that it may be said sometimes that the flesh falls off from him.
Tarent..Mind, restlessness: Anxiety and restlessness are words that prevail through all the conditions in it. The extreme restlessness of the limbs is like Ars. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head. Restlessness of the limbs in the evening, in bed before going to sleep, like Ars. and Lyc.
Tarent..Appetite: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food.
Tarent..Appetite, desires: Aversion to food; aversion to meat especially, though craves raw food.
Tarent..Clinical: It has cured most terrible and alarming constipation after cathartics and injections failed to effect a movement. It has cured Diphtheria. It has cured palpitation with mitral murmurs. It has cured angina pectoris. Nymphomania has been cured by this remedy. Fibroid tumors have been cured. It has cured a dry itching eczema of the extremities and other parts of the skin after Ars. and Sulph. have failed. Sugar in the urine and it has cured diabetes.
Tarent..Abdomen: There is burning in the abdomen that extends down through the intestines. Sharp pain in the spleen. The liver is painful to touch and is swollen. Pain in both sides of the abdomen. The abdomen is distended with flatus. Subject to much colic. Shooting pains in the abdomen, anus and vagina at the same time. Severe pains in the lower abdomen.
Tarent..Head, pain: Headache in the evening; in the morning on waking. Cannot open the eyes. Bending head forward aggravates. Pains are pressing and often wander around from place to place in the head; violent pain in the occiput and temples at the same time.
Tarent..Stomach, eructations, empty: Has an empty all-gone feeling in the stomach, an anxious feeling in the stomach.
Tarent..Abdomen, flatulence: The abdomen is distended with flatus.
Tarent..Extremities, motion: Must move the hands constantly and pick the fingers from nervousness. He is moving the legs constantly. Anxiety, restlessness, constant motion of the arms, legs, trunk and head.
Tarent..Generalities, irritability, excessive ph: Excessive hyperesthesia; all the symptoms are worse from grief and excitement.
Tarent..Larynx and trachea: Constantly scraping of larynx and trachea to clear them of MUCUS. Loss of voice and hoarseness; loss of voice when talking. Dryness in the larynx and trachea. Burning from the throat down into the chest.
Tarent..Mind, hysteria: It is one of our high grade remedies for hysterical women. In the hysterical symptoms she is better from music. Her motions are ludicrous and she is even lascivious in her conduct. Great excitement from music; she sings until she falls with exhaustion. Tarentula patients feign all sorts of sickness, especially fainting. They not only imagine themselves sick, but they pretend to be sick when they are not.
